hero.label: Your Everyday Digital Partner
hero.title:
Your All in One
 Digital Companion
hero.subtitle: Anytime, anywhere. Just your phone, your code, your way. Because life is simpler when everything you need is in one place.

features.title: Powering Daily Life, One Click at a Time.
features.subtitle: Sabil brings your daily digital needs into one secure platform.

recharge.title: Recharge & Share
recharge.description: Top up your balance instantly with a digital voucher and send credit to anyone, anytime. It's fast, easy, and available wherever you are.

send.title: Send & Receive
send.description: Send credit to anyone, receive rewards, and enjoy secure, instant transfers, all from your Sabil wallet.

access.title: Access More
access.description: Need to pay bills or renew your internet? Sabil makes it easy. From utilities to mobile and Wi-Fi, everything can be paid in one place securely and instantly.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Discover the Sabil ecosystem built for your everyday digital life.

sabilApp.title: Sabil App
sabilApp.description: Your all in one mobile companion for recharges, transfers, bill payments, and more. Fast, secure, and always at your fingertips.

sabilStore.title: Sabil Store
sabilStore.description: Open your digital store and start selling online with zero hassle. Manage products, orders, and payments in one place.

sabilGo.title: Sabil Go
sabilGo.description: Book a ride anytime, anywhere. Sabil Go connects you with reliable drivers for safe, comfortable journeys across the city.

sabilPay.title: Sabil Pay
sabilPay.description: Accept payments seamlessly with Sabil Pay. A modern fintech solution for businesses and individuals alike.

partners.title: Sabil Partners
partners.subtitle: Trusted by leading brands and institutions across Algeria.

classifieds.title: Sabil Classifieds Ads
classifieds.excerpt: We're excited to announce that Sabil Classifieds, our upcoming classified ads platform, is currently in preparation and will be launching soon.

go.title: Sabil Go, a new way of riding.
go.excerpt: We're excited to announce that Sabil Go, our upcoming VTC service, is currently in preparation and will be launching soon.

albaraka.title: Platform Sabil Albaraka
albaraka.excerpt: 🚀 Sabil × Al Baraka Bank: A New Era of Sharia-Compliant BNPL in Algeria. We are proud to announce a groundbreaking partnership.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.partnerDescription: Join the Sabil ecosystem and grow your business with us.

footer.description: Your All-in-One Digital Companion in Algeria. Simplifying mobile recharges, transfers, and payments.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to get latest news and updates.

downloadModal.subtitle: Choose your platform to start your digital journey.
